text: You're doing better than you think you are.
author: Unknown

text: Small progress is still progress.
author: Unknown

text: You got this. Yes, you!
author: Unknown

text: Every expert was once a beginner.
author: Unknown

text: Be a voice, not an echo.
author: Unknown

text: Your only limit is you.
author: Unknown

text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
author: Theodore Roosevelt

text: It's not about having time — it's about making time.
author: Unknown

text: Do it with passion or not at all.
author: Unknown

text: Stars can't shine without darkness.
author: Unknown

text: Work hard in silence, let success be your noise.
author: Frank Ocean

text: You are enough just as you are.
author: Unknown

text: Take the first step in faith. You don't have to see the whole staircase.
author: Martin Luther King Jr.

text: Be the energy you want to attract.
author: Unknown

text: Your vibe attracts your tribe.
author: Unknown

text: Don't wait for the perfect moment. Take the moment and make it perfect.
author: Unknown

text: You don't have to be great to start, but you have to start to be great.
author: Zig Ziglar

text: The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
author: Mark Twain

text: Turn your can'ts into cans and your dreams into plans.
author: Unknown

text: Be proud of how far you've come.
author: Unknown

text: Everything you've ever wanted is on the other side of fear.
author: Unknown

text: Yes, you can!
author: Unknown

text: Bloom where you are planted.
author: Unknown

text: You are capable of amazing things.
author: Unknown

text: Start where you are. Use what you have. Do what you can.
author: Arthur Ashe
